zh.lifeSummary: 當John Tilley於1571年12月15日出生在英國貝德福爾亨洛福時，他的父親Robert Tilley31歲，母親Elizabeth28歲。他於1596年9月20日與Joan Hurst在英國貝德福爾亨洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1620年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。他在荷蘭霍蘭萊登被列為silk worker。他去世於從1621年1月到1621年3月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Tilley于1571年12月15日出生在英国貝德福爾亨洛福时，他的父亲Robert Tilley31岁，母亲Elizabeth28岁。他于1596年9月20日与Joan Hurst在英国貝德福爾亨洛福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1620年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。他在荷兰霍蘭萊登被列为silk worker。他去世于从1621年1月到1621年3月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Tilley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tilly-sur-Seulles (Calvados) or Tilly (Eure), France.

English: habitational name from Tyley in Wotton under Edge (Gloucestershire), Tiley in Minterne Magna (Dorset), or Tilley (Shropshire). The Gloucestershire and Dorset placenames derive from Old English tigel ‘tile’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Shropshire placename derives from an uncertain first element + Old English lēah.
English: occupational name from Middle English tilie ‘one who tills the land, a husbandman’. Compare Tiller .

variants.name: Tillie
meanings: English (northern England and southern Scotland): variant of   Tilley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tiller
meanings: English (southern, especially Hampshire): occupational name from Middle English tiliere, tilyer ‘one who tills the soil, husbandman, farmer, farm laborer’. This is a derivative of Old English tilian ‘to till (the soil)’, Middle English tilie. There has been some confusion of this name with Tyler .

variants.name: Tiley
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Somerset and Wiltshire): variant of   Tilley  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.description: William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.
The siege of Leiden between the rebels and the Spanish. 1574 The dikes were opened allowing a Dutch fleet to sail over the flood waters and rescue Leiden.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.description: Britain waged wars against the Dutch.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Tilley was born on 15 December 1571, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Robert Tilley, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 28. He married Joan Hurst on 20 September 1596, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He immigrated to Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1620. His occupation is listed as silk worker in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands. He died from January 1621 to March 1621, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Tilley est né le 15 décembre 1571, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Tilley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hurst le 20 septembre 1596, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il a immigré au Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1620. Sa profession de son indiquée est silk worker à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas. Il est décédé du janvier 1621 au mars 1621, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Tilley am 15. Dezember 1571 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Tilley 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 28. Er hat am 20. September 1596 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England Joan Hurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er ist 1620 nach Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. sein Beruf ist als silk worker in Leiden, Holland, Niederlande aufgeführt. Er starb von Januar 1621 bis März 1621 in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Tilley è nato il il 15 dicembre 1571 nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Tilley, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan Hurst il 20 settembre 1596, nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Immigrato nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1620. La sua occupazione è indicata come silk worker nel Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi. Morì da gennaio 1621 a marzo 1621, nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Tilleyが1571年12月15日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウで生まれた時，父Robert Tilleyは31歳，母Elizabethは28歳であった。1596年9月20日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウでJoan Hurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1620年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに移住した。オランダホーランドレイデンでの職業はsilk workerと記録されている。彼はから1621年1月まで1621年3月にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스

ko.lifeSummary: John Tilley(이)가 1571년 12월 15일 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Tilley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1596년 9월 20일 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 Joan Hurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1620년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그의 직업은 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서 silk worker이었다. 그는 1621년 1월 부터 1621년 3월 까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Tilley nasceu em 15 de dezembro de 1571, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Tilley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Hurst em 20 de setembro de 1596, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1620. Sua profissão aparece como silk worker em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos. Ele faleceu de janeiro de 1621 a março de 1621, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Tilley родился 15 декабря 1571 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Tilley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hurst 20 сентября 1596 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он иммигрировал в плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1620 году.  Он работал по профессии silk worker в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды. Он умер с январь 1621 по марта 1621 в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Tilley nació el 15 de diciembre de 1571, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Tilley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joan Hurst el 20 de septiembre de 1596, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Inmigró a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1620. Su ocupación registrada era silk worker en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos. Murió desde enero de 1621 hasta marzo de 1621, en Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.
